claims.claim: High-entropy pressure smoothing should expose whether semantic viscosity persists rather than only showing a snapshot.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `semantic_viscosity_persistence_index` and `semantic_viscosity_persistence_state` to `PressureTrendSmoothingV1`, derived from recent semantic-viscosity stability and pressure motion without changing control.

claims.claim: The bridge should compare semantic viscosity against raw high-entropy movement to see whether smoothing blunts texture.
claims.rationale: Added a focused smoothing regression test where semantic viscosity remains persistent across pressure movement and is surfaced as `persistent_thickness_against_motion`.

claims.claim: Distinguishability loss should be cross-referenced with mode packing over telemetry to test whether overpacked feeling correlates with eigenvalue distinctness loss.
claims.rationale: This needs a bounded telemetry/replay observation rather than a static-code conclusion; it was promoted as sandbox/runtime observation work.

claims.claim: Lowering `PRESSURE_TREND_SMOOTHING_FULL_ENTROPY_AT` from 0.95 to 0.88 might make high-entropy tracking more responsive.
claims.rationale: Changing this threshold alters live pressure-smoothing/report semantics and may increase ballast rather than responsiveness at 0.91 entropy; it needs sandbox evidence plus Mike/operator approval before implementation.
